title: Brad Alford
compiled_truth: Brad Alford is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-18 to 2001-10-30), Brad Alford sent 13 and received 62 emails, totalling 75 interactions. Top correspondents: [Lisa Mellencamp](people/lisa-mellencamp) (11), [Lewis Worthy](people/lewis-worthy) (10), [Christopher Coffman](people/christopher-coffman) (10), [Todd Busby](people/todd-busby) (10), [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (10).
